home.title: Tortellino d'Oro | Restaurant · Fresh Pasta in Milan
home.description: An author's trattoria in the heart of Milan: pasta hand-rolled every morning, seasonal ingredients, tradition revisited with restraint.

menu.title: The Menu | Tortellino d'Oro
menu.description: Starters, hand-rolled fresh pasta, mains and house desserts. The Tortellino d'Oro menu, between tradition and season.

about.title: About Us | Tortellino d'Oro
about.description: Our origins, our philosophy and the daily ritual of the sfoglia: the story of Tortellino d'Oro, an author's trattoria in Milan.

contact.title: Book a table | Tortellino d'Oro
contact.description: Book a table at Tortellino d'Oro online: choose your date, time and number of guests. Address, hours and how to reach us in Milan.

eventi.title: Private Events | Tortellino d'Oro
eventi.description: Private dinners, banquets and corporate events at Tortellino d'Oro. Tell us about your occasion and we'll get in touch to plan every detail together.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Tortellino d'Oro
privacy.description: How we handle your personal data under the GDPR: what we collect through bookings, why, who we share it with, and the rights you have.

chapters.title: Every morning at six
chapters.body: Fresh eggs, carefully chosen flour, the wooden board still cold. Before the city wakes, the workshop already smells of pasta dough.

chapters.title: The sfoglia
chapters.body: Rolled by hand until it lets the light through. That's where the hand shows, and that's where the whole dish is decided.

chapters.title: The dish
chapters.body: The broth has been simmering for eight hours; the tortellini go in last. The rest is the time you take at the table.

dishes.name: Tortellini in capon broth
dishes.description: Paper-thin pasta, the classic filling, an eight-hour broth.

dishes.name: Tagliatelle with white ragù
dishes.description: A tomato-free courtyard ragù, slowly cooked in white wine.

dishes.name: Pumpkin and amaretti tortelli
dishes.description: Mantuan pumpkin, amaretti, brown butter and sage.

experience.title: A dining room that speaks softly
experience.body: Dark wood, handmade ceramics, raw linen and a light that warms without glaring. Forty seats, not one more: every table has its own space and its own pace.

experience2.title: Every detail has a maker
experience2.body: The ceramics come from a single potter's wheel; the linen is woven a few kilometres away. Nothing in the room is anonymous: behind every object there is a name.

menuPage.title: The Menu
menuPage.subtitle: A short menu, chosen with the seasons. All our pasta is born in our workshop.
menuPage.legendAllergens: Allergens are listed under each dish. For severe intolerances, please tell our staff.
menuPage.pastaNote: All our pasta is fresh, hand-rolled in our own workshop.

items.name: Hand-cut Fassona beef, hazelnuts and Castelmagno
items.description: Knife-cut, Ligurian olive oil, shavings of alpine Castelmagno.

items.name: Charcoal-grilled artichoke, savoury zabaione
items.description: Artichoke heart cooked over the flame, Parmigiano zabaione.

items.name: Culatello di Zibello with gnocco fritto
items.description: Aged 24 months, gnocco fritto fried to order.

items.name: Tortellini in capon broth
items.description: The dish we are named after. Paper-thin pasta, an eight-hour broth.

items.name: Tagliatelle with white ragù
items.description: A tomato-free courtyard ragù, slowly cooked in white wine.

items.name: Pumpkin and amaretti tortelli
items.description: Mantuan pumpkin, amaretti, brown butter and crisp sage.

items.name: Tagliolini with lemon and bottarga
items.description: The thinnest of pasta, lemon butter, grey mullet bottarga.

items.name: Potato gnocchi, red wine and gorgonzola
items.description: Featherlight gnocchi, red wine reduction, sweet gorgonzola DOP.

items.name: Beef cheek braised in Barbera
items.description: Twelve hours of slow cooking, mashed potatoes with alpine butter.

items.name: Guinea fowl stuffed with chestnuts
items.description: Breast and leg, chestnut and sausage stuffing, dark jus.

items.name: Whipped salt cod, charred polenta
items.description: Whipped with Ligurian olive oil, heritage-corn polenta off the grill.

items.name: Charcoal-grilled seasonal vegetables
items.description: From the morning market, olive oil and Cervia sea salt.

items.name: Mashed potatoes with alpine butter
items.description: Whipped to order, as generous as it should be.

items.name: Field greens, aged wine vinegar
items.description: Bitter herbs and crisp leaves, dressed at the table.

items.name: Zuppa inglese, served by the spoonful
Hazelnut cake, Moscato zabaione
items.description: Piedmont hazelnut IGP, flourless, warm zabaione.

items.name: Lemon and olive oil sorbet
items.description: Sorrento lemons, extra-virgin olive oil, Maldon salt.

wine.name: Wine List
wine.body: Around one hundred and fifty labels, with a soft spot for small producers from the Langhe, Oltrepò and the Emilian Apennines. The full list is available in the dining room — ask us, we love talking about it.

sections.title: Where we come from
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — the real story: family, opening year, territory. Tone: "It all begins in a small-town kitchen, where on Sundays the pasta dough covered the whole table. In 20XX that tradition moved to Milan, with one promise: do few things, do them every day, do them by hand."]

sections.title: Tradition revisited, with restraint
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — suppliers and seasonality. Tone: "Revisiting doesn't mean distorting: it means removing the unnecessary and listening to the season. Our suppliers are names and faces, not price lists: the Parmigiano comes from a single dairy."]

sections.title: The ritual of the rolling pin
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — the daily ritual: who rolls it, when, how. Tone: "At seven in the morning the workshop already smells of flour. The dough is rolled until it lets the light through: that's where the whole dish is decided."]

contactPage.title: Book a table
contactPage.subtitle: Choose your date, time and number of guests — we'll confirm as soon as we can. For same-day bookings, a phone call works best.

form.title: Your reservation
form.name: Full name
form.selectDateTime: Please pick a date and time to continue.
form.success: You'll receive a confirmation email as soon as the restaurant has accepted your reservation.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or call us.
form.note: For same-day reservations, please call us directly.

contactPage.mapAria: Map showing the location of the Tortellino d'Oro restaurant

eventiPage.title: Your event, rolled by hand
eventiPage.subtitle: Private dinners, celebrations, banquets and corporate gatherings: we open our dining room — or just part of it — for occasions that deserve the same care as our pasta.

intro.title: A dining room that becomes yours
intro.body: From a table set aside for a few to the exclusive use of the whole place, we build every event around the people living it. The same workshop, the same fresh pasta hand-rolled each morning, but a menu and a pace meant only for you. Forty seats, not one more: every occasion has its own space and its own time.

formats.title: Private dinners
formats.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, family dinners. A tailored menu and a corner of the room that's all yours, with the kitchen working around your evening.

formats.title: Banquets & celebrations
formats.description: Christenings, graduations, important toasts. The whole room exclusively yours, dedicated service and courses planned together, from the sfoglia to dessert.

formats.title: Corporate events
formats.description: Working dinners, launches, team lunches. Reserved spaces, timing tuned to your programme and a kitchen that never becomes background noise.

detail.title: Built together, course by course
detail.body: There's no pre-printed events menu. We start from the season and your occasion, choose the courses, match the cellar and account for allergies and intolerances. You tell us the idea; we translate it onto the table.

how.title: From request to table
how.note: Once we receive your request, we get in touch personally to discuss the organisation together: date, number of guests, menu and every detail of the event.

steps.title: 1 · Tell us about the occasion
steps.body: Fill in the form below with the type of event and a few notes: the more detail you give us, the better we can reply.

steps.title: 2 · We get back to you
steps.body: We write or call to understand the date, number of guests and wishes, and to plan the menu and spaces together.

steps.title: 3 · We settle the details
steps.body: We agree on menu, timing and a quote. When it all adds up, the date is yours.

form.title: Request information
form.name: Full name
form.notesPlaceholder: Approximate date, number of guests, ideas or special requests…
form.success: We've received your request. We'll get back to you soon to plan your event together.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or call us.
form.note: We'll get in touch to settle every detail of the event together.

confermaPage.pendingIntro: Review the details and choose whether to confirm or decline. The guest will receive an email only after confirmation.
confermaPage.confirmedIntro: We've sent the confirmation to the guest. See you soon.
confermaPage.rejectedIntro: The reservation has been marked as declined. No email was sent to the guest.
confermaPage.notFoundIntro: This link is invalid or the reservation no longer exists.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your personal data when you book a table or get in touch.
privacyPage.intro: This notice explains how Tortellino d'Oro processes the personal data collected through this website, in particular via the booking form, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable data-protection law.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is Tortellino d'Oro, located at Via dei Sarti 12, 20121 Milan, Italy. For any request regarding your personal data, you can write to us at the email address below.
controller.note: [PLACEHOLDER — full legal name, VAT number and, if appointed, the contact details of the Data Protection Officer (DPO).]

data.title: What data we collect
data.intro: Through the booking form we collect the data you provide directly:
items: Date and time of the booking

health.title: Data about allergies and intolerances
body: The notes field is optional and may contain information about food allergies or intolerances. Such information constitutes health data, a special category of personal data under Article 9 of the GDPR.
We process this data solely to handle your booking safely and welcome you appropriately, and only where you provide it spontaneously, on a voluntary basis.
We ask you to enter in the notes field only the information that is strictly necessary, and not to share sensitive data that is not essential to the booking.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.intro: We process your data for the following purposes, each with its own legal basis:

items.purpose: Managing your booking and sending you the confirmation
items.basis: Performance of pre-contractual and contractual measures — Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR

items.purpose: Keeping a history of bookings and monitoring how the restaurant is doing through internal statistics
items.basis: The controller's legitimate interest in running and improving the service — Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR

items.purpose: Processing any information about allergies or intolerances entered in the notes field
items.basis: Consent, on a voluntary basis, for special categories of data — Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR

recipients.title: Who we share data with
recipients.intro: To deliver the service we rely on a few external providers, which process data on our behalf as data processors:

items.name: Supabase
items.detail: The database where bookings are stored. The servers used are located in the European Union (Frankfurt, Germany): the data stays within the EU.

items.name: Resend
items.detail: Sending booking notification and confirmation emails. The provider is based in the United States: processing may involve transfers of data outside the EU, based on Standard Contractual Clauses and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

items.name: Cloudflare
items.detail: Hosting and delivery of the website. Here too, transfers of data outside the EU may occur, based on Standard Contractual Clauses and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

recipients.note: We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

transfers.title: Transfers outside the European Union
transfers.body: Some providers may process data outside the European Union. In such cases, the transfer takes place in compliance with the GDPR, on the basis of appropriate safeguards such as the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission and/or the provider's certification under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

cookies.title: Cookies
body: This site uses only technical and essential cookies. Specifically, a single session cookie is used, exclusively by the restaurant's staff to access the reserved area.
We do not use profiling or analytics cookies for visitors. For this reason, browsing the site does not require any cookie-consent banner.

retention.title: How long we keep your data
retention.body: We keep booking data for as long as necessary to manage the booking and to comply with legal obligations (for example accounting and tax requirements), after which the data is deleted or anonymised.
retention.note: [PLACEHOLDER — precise retention period to be agreed with the restaurant, e.g. months for internal statistics and years for documents with tax relevance.]

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: As a data subject, you may exercise the rights provided by Articles 15-22 of the GDPR at any time:
items: Rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data
Erasure of your data (the right to be forgotten)
Objection to processing based on legitimate interest
Withdrawal of consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal
rights.contactLabel: To exercise these rights, write to us at
rights.complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority, the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante per la protezione dei dati personali, www.garanteprivacy.it), if you believe that the processing of your data infringes applicable law.

changes.title: Changes to this notice
changes.body: We may update this notice over time. The version in force is always the one published on this page, with its last-updated date shown above.
